subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! In this wondrous Dispensation, learning and teaching are among the most exalted commandments of the Lord, the All-Bountiful, as attested by the Sacred Text [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی در این دور بدیع تعلم و تعلیم از اعظم اوامر رب کریمست و نصوص کتاب
subcodes.subjects: @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @high station of learning, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @empty learning; false spirituality
